The Chattanooga Guides Series

El Desmadre : 06-20-2026

When: 2026-06-20 (Friday)
Time: 8:00pm
Venue: Barrelhouse Ballroom
Address: 1501 Long St, Chattanooga, TN 37408
Entrance Fee: $20 advance / $25 door
Event Website
#music#live-events

El Desmadre brings the chaos to Barrelhouse Ballroom on a Saturday night. The name translates to the mayhem, and the shows tend to back it up. Doors at 8pm. $20 advance or $25 at the door. 18+.
